typeProperties.script:
source(output(
        Month as string,
        DayOfWeek as string,
        Expenses as string
    ),
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> Flat_File_Source
